overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through a vibrant meadow filled with wildflowers. The character navigates through a rural landscape with distant mountains, lush green grass, and scattered trees under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through wildflower meadow

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path, occasionally glancing at the colorful wildflowers lining the route

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with visible tire tracks and scattered stones
lush green grass with mixed wildflowers covering the rolling hills
clusters of red poppies growing along the path edges
tall purple lupine flowers scattered throughout the meadow
hazy blue mountain range forming the horizon backdrop
sparse deciduous trees with thin canopies dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright, sunny day in a rural meadow. The camera follows the character from behind as he walks along a winding dirt path surrounded by vibrant green grass and colorful wildflowers. Red poppies and purple lupines line the route while distant mountains rise against a blue sky. The path ahead shows a fork in the distance.

events.description: character reaches a fork in the road and takes the right path

agents.ego_description: navigating the fork in the road by turning right onto the wider path, then continuing forward

entered.detail: diverging dirt paths forming a Y-junction in the meadow
dense shrubbery with green foliage clustered near the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and navigates a fork in the dirt road, choosing the right branch. The landscape opens up to reveal more expansive views of the distant mountains. The path continues through the meadow with wildflowers visible on both sides. The terrain remains consistent with rolling green hills and scattered vegetation.

events.description: character turns left at a path intersection to follow the main trail

agents.ego_description: making a deliberate left turn at the path intersection to continue along the primary route

entered.detail: crossroads where multiple dirt paths meet in the grassland
thicker cluster of trees forming a small woodland area
small settlement or structures visible on the horizon between the hills

segments.scene_description: After turning left at a path intersection, the character continues along a trail that reveals a distant village or settlement on the horizon. The right side of the path features denser tree clusters while the left remains open meadow. The path surface shows more pronounced wear with visible ruts and stones.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding meadow trail with forest edge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding path, heading toward the distant tree line

entered.detail: large stone formation visible on the left hillside

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character continuing along the winding dirt path as it curves gently through the meadow. The dense tree line on the right approaches closer while distant mountains remain visible ahead. The path shows signs of regular use with compacted earth and scattered stones. Wildflowers continue to dot the grassy verges on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant rural meadow that gradually opens into a more expansive mountain vista. It begins by trailing the character from behind as he walks along a winding dirt path flanked by red poppies and purple lupines under a bright blue sky. As he advances, the camera maintains its position, capturing the rolling green hills and distant peaks that frame the horizon. The scene then shifts as the character reaches and navigates a fork in the road, choosing the right branch. This turn causes the landscape to expand, revealing a broader view of the distant mountains as the path continues through the wildflower-lined meadow.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding rural trail that leads from an open intersection toward a distant settlement. It begins as the character turns left onto a worn dirt path, where the landscape is split between a wide, open meadow on the left and dense clusters of trees on the right. As the camera advances, the path reveals more pronounced ruts and stones, guiding the view toward a village appearing on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the trail curves gently through the meadow, bringing the dense tree line closer to the right side of the frame. Finally, the movement continues across the compacted earth and scattered wildflowers, keeping the distant mountains visible ahead under a bright sky.
